# AgToosa Community & Support

## GitHub Discussions

AgToosa uses **GitHub Discussions** as the primary community space for support, ideas, and collaboration.

### Discussion Categories

**❓ Q&A** — Ask questions about setup, usage, troubleshooting
- How do I integrate with [AI tool]?
- Why is my workflow file not working?
- How do I customize the context files?

**💡 Ideas** — Suggest improvements and new features
- Vote on existing feature ideas
- Share creative use cases
- Propose platform integrations

**🎉 Show & Tell** — Share your AgToosa projects
- Case studies
- Custom workflow extensions
- Integration examples

**📢 Announcements** — Release notes, upgrades, deprecations
- Follow for new versions
- Migration guides
- Breaking changes

## Getting Help

### 1. Check the Docs
- [Getting Started](https://github.com/wiki/AgToosa/Getting-Started)
- [CLI Reference](https://github.com/wiki/AgToosa/CLI-Reference)
- [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/wiki/AgToosa/Troubleshooting)

### 2. Search Discussions
- [Already asked?](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/discussions)
- [Known issues](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)

### 3. File an Issue
- [Report a bug](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues/new?template=bug.yml)
- [Request a feature](https://github.com/sky2464/AgToosa/issues/new?template=feature.yml)

## Reporting Security Issues

Found a security vulnerability? Please report it to `security@agtoosa.dev` instead of GitHub Issues. See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for details.

## Code of Conduct

We follow the [Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md). Be respectful, inclusive, and professional.

## Contributing

Want to contribute? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for:
- Development setup
- Running tests
- Submitting pull requests
- Release process
